name: codex-continuity
description: Thin continuity adapter for Codex. Adds session retrieval, structured ad-hoc capture, read-only lifecycle context injection, and stop-time note settling over the stock memories workspace.

interface.shortDescription: Thin continuity tooling for Codex memory and sessions.
interface.longDescription: Adds continuity workflow on top of stock Codex memory without modifying codex-rs: capture skills write structured ad-hoc notes to ~/.codex/memories/extensions/ad_hoc/notes/, a retrieval MCP sidecar exposes project summary, search, related-file lookup, recent-decision lookup, session context, note draft, note settling, explicit core memory update draft/apply, and workspace status tools, SessionStart/UserPromptSubmit hooks inject a thin prior-session context projection through additionalContext, and a fail-open Stop hook settles final session outcomes into ad-hoc notes or hash-protected ad-hoc note updates. Stable session outcomes now also surface reviewable core-memory promotion drafts for MEMORY.md or memory_summary.md. Codex host runtime remains the source of truth for additional_context role handling, deduplication, and truncation; codex-continuity stays focused on session retrieval, digesting, settling, and promotion workflow. Core MEMORY.md and memory_summary.md are not forbidden: intentional corrections use explicit reviewed draft/apply with hash protection; automatic hooks remain review-first to avoid silently overwriting consolidation output.
defaultPrompt: Finish this task, capture the root cause, and use memory retrieval when prior context may help.
Fix this bug, save a structured ad-hoc memory note, and search related files and past decisions in memory.
